questionHtml:
What happens to an RNA molecule in eukaryotes after transcription in order to process it into mRNA?

A.  Introns are added.

B.  Exons are removed.

C.  Adenine nucleotides are added at the 3’ end.

D.  Adenine nucleotides are removed from the 5’ end.
